debug_info.goal:
C : Type
inst✝¹ : Category.{0, 0} C
K : Type
inst✝ : DivisionRing K
M : CategoryTheory.Functor C (ModuleCat K)
D : @DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M
B : (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) → N ∈ D → Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)
hB : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), N = sSup (B N hN)
hB' : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), sSupIndep (B N hN)
hB'' : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), ⊥ ∉ B N hN
H : ∃ N, ∃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN ≠ {N}
⊢ D < @DirectSumDecomposition.refinement C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M D B hB hB' hB''

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
by

      have hbot : N = ⊥ := by

        · exact bot_le
      exact D.not_bot_mem (hbot ▸ hN)

  have hsubset : (B N hN) ⊆ D := by
    intro x hx
    have hx' : x ∈ refinement (D := D) B hB hB' hB'' := by
      exact Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨N, Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨hN, Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨x, Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨hx, rfl⟩⟩⟩⟩
    have : x ∈ D := by simpa [hEq] using hx'
    exact this
  have hBsub_singleton : B N hN ⊆ {N} := by

    have hxD : x ∈ D := hsubset x hx
    have hxle : x ≤ N := by
